battleTraits.name: Fortify Position
battleTraits.description: Units that did not move in the movement phase reduce enemy Rend by 1 when attacked.

regimentAbilities.name: Mark Targets
regimentAbilities.description: Pick a visible enemy unit. Friendly units add +1 to Hit rolls when shooting that target until end of turn.

regimentAbilities.name: Blazing Weapons
regimentAbilities.description: Pick a friendly unit. Melee weapons gain Crit (Mortal) until next turn.
